flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Vernon College rose 71% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.6k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 32% at Vernon College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.7k vs 2.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Vernon College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (18.4% vs 24.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Vernon College rose 89% between 2021 and 2024 (21.9% → 41.3%).
